title: How to make stress your friend
description: A health psychologist on why rethinking stress can transform how your body responds to pressure.

title: 5-Minute Meditation You Can Do Anywhere
description: A short, guided meditation to reset your mind between classes, before exams, or whenever it gets noisy.

title: Guided Meditation for Anxiety & Stress
description: A calming guided practice to ease anxious thoughts and bring you back into your body.

title: Sleep Stories for College Students
description: Peaceful bedtime stories designed to help you drift off to sleep on busy semester nights.

title: Exam Stress Relief Meditation
description: Calm your nerves before and after exams with this short guided meditation.

title: Tips for getting better sleep
description: Evidence-backed habits that improve the quality and depth of your sleep — beyond just more hours.

title: Student mental health: tips for coping
description: Practical advice for managing low mood, loneliness, and pressure during student life.

title: What is mindfulness? A beginner's guide
description: A clear, friendly introduction to what mindfulness actually is — and how to start practising in everyday life.

title: Beat exam stress: a practical guide
description: Simple, science-backed strategies for managing pressure during exam season.

title: Coping with anxiety and panic
description: Recognise the signs of anxiety and learn techniques to calm the nervous system in the moment.

title: 4-7-8 breathing: a calming exercise
description: A simple breath pattern (inhale 4, hold 7, exhale 8) that can help you fall asleep or settle a racing mind.

title: 5-4-3-2-1 grounding exercise
description: A sensory grounding technique to interrupt anxiety, panic, or overwhelming thoughts.

title: Progressive muscle relaxation
description: Step-by-step guide to releasing physical tension by tensing and relaxing muscle groups in sequence.

title: Body scan meditation
description: A guided body-scan practice to release stress that has built up across the day.

title: Box breathing technique
description: The breathing pattern used by Navy SEALs to stay calm under pressure — works for exam stress too.
